hypotheses.name: GO term embedding clustering across layers
hypotheses.method: For 80 sampled GO BP terms (from 190 valid; 5-200 genes each), compute mean pairwise cosine dist among member genes at each of 12 layers vs 20 random-group null replicates. Gene set: 209 known indexed genes.
hypotheses.result_value: mean_z=-1.11, 0/12 layers sig (z<-1.96); all layers z<0
hypotheses.next_action: Recover full 4803-gene vocabulary and rerun with n~500 genes per group for adequate power

hypotheses.name: Per-gene residual drift + GO enrichment
hypotheses.method: Compute L2(layer_11 - layer_0) per gene = residual drift. Split into top-50/bot-50 genes by drift. Fisher exact test for 187 valid GO BP terms enrichment in top vs bottom drift group.
hypotheses.result_value: GO:0006357 (regulation of transcription by RNA Pol II) OR=3.58 p=0.0044; 7/187 terms p<0.05; 0 FDR-significant
hypotheses.next_action: Rerun with full gene vocabulary (4803 genes); validate top hits with permutation test across multiple split thresholds

hypotheses.name: Effective rank per layer (spectral cross-check vs TwoNN ID)
hypotheses.method: Compute effective rank = exp(entropy(squared singular values / sum)) for 209-gene embedding submatrix at each of 12 layers. Compare to TwoNN ID from iter_0004 via Pearson and Spearman correlation.
hypotheses.result_value: Pearson r=0.793 (p=0.002), Spearman r=0.720 (p=0.008); ER monotone decrease layer 0->11: 7.89->1.28 (6x compression)
hypotheses.next_action: Run MADA as third independent ID estimator; investigate ER-CKA correlation across layer pairs
